email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service Medewerker bij VIVALDIS in Hasselt. Uw klant is gespecialiseerd in incidentmanagement en pechhulp, een omgeving waar ik mijn communicatieve vaardigheden en gestructureerde aanpak goed kan inzetten.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik gewend om snel en accuraat informatie te verwerken, deadlines te respecteren en helder te communiceren met verschillende partijen. Daarnaast heb ik via eerdere ervaring in logistiek en front-end ontwikkeling geleerd om stressbestendig en georganiseerd te werken.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau – ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik ben flexibel inzetbaar voor weekend- en avonddiensten.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at VIVALDIS in Hasselt. Your client specializes in incident management and roadside assistance, an environment where I can effectively use my communication skills and structured approach.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am used to processing information quickly and accurately, meeting deadlines, and communicating clearly with various parties. Additionally, through previous experience in logistics and front-end development, I have learned to work in a stress-resistant and organized manner.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level – I am currently taking classes to improve further. I am flexible for weekend and evening shifts.

I look forward to explaining my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel interesse solliciteer ik naar de functie van Customer Service Medewerker bij VIVALDIS in Hasselt. Uw opdrachtgever, gespecialiseerd in incidentmanagement en pechhulp, zoekt iemand die klantvriendelijk, stressbestendig en georganiseerd is – eigenschappen die ik in mijn loopbaan heb ontwikkeld.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van meerdere projecten tegelijk, het nauwkeurig verwerken van informatie en het communiceren met klanten en teamleden. Ik werk gestructureerd en plan mijn taken zorgvuldig om deadlines te halen. Deze vaardigheden zijn direct toepasbaar in de rol van customer service officer, waar u vraagt om het opvolgen van contracten, het monitoren van afspraken en het updaten van betrokken partijen.

Daarnaast heb ik via eerdere ervaring in de logistiek (Katoen Natie) geleerd om onder druk accuraat te blijven en snel te schakelen tussen taken. Mijn technische achtergrond als front-end developer helpt mij om vlot met computers en software om te gaan, waaronder MS Office.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau – ik volg actief lessen om dit te verbeteren. Ik ben flexibel inzetbaar voor de weekend- en avonddiensten zoals vermeld in de vacature.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de combinatie van klantcontact, administratieve nauwkeurigheid en de kans om te groeien in een internationaal team. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn steentje bij te dragen en kijk uit naar een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very interested in applying for the Customer Service Officer position at VIVALDIS in Hasselt. Your client, specialized in incident management and roadside assistance, is looking for someone who is customer-friendly, stress-resistant, and organized – qualities I have developed throughout my career.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple projects simultaneously, process information accurately, and communicate with clients and team members. I work in a structured manner and plan my tasks carefully to meet deadlines. These skills are directly applicable to the customer service officer role, where you require following up contracts, monitoring agreements, and updating involved parties.

Additionally, through previous experience in logistics (Katoen Natie), I learned to stay accurate under pressure and switch quickly between tasks. My technical background as a front-end developer helps me work easily with computers and software, including MS Office.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level – I am actively taking lessons to improve. I am flexible for the weekend and evening shifts as mentioned in the vacancy.

What appeals to me in this position is the combination of customer contact, administrative accuracy, and the opportunity to grow in an international team. I am motivated to contribute and look forward to a conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Communicatief vaardig in Engels en Turks, Nederlands op B1-niveau (in opleiding)
- Ervaring met klantcontact en informatieverwerking in een dynamische omgeving
- Stressbestendig en georganiseerd door ervaring in logistiek en projectmanagement
- Technisch onderlegd: vlot met computers, MS Office en diverse software
- Flexibel inzetbaar voor weekend- en avonddiensten
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service · Communication · Digital
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: handling phone calls and emails, gathering and verifying information, updating stakeholders, monitoring agreements, meeting deadlines
- Computer proficiency: MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook), Google Workspace, various CRM and project management tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Organizational & time management: managing multiple tasks simultaneously, prioritizing, working under pressure
- Stress resistance: ability to remain accurate and efficient in high-volume, fast-paced environments
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
